2605.10100.title: HYPERPOSE: Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention for 3D Human Pose Estimation
2605.10100.paper_summary: We introduce HYPERPOSE, a novel 3D human pose estimation framework that performs spatio-temporal reasoning entirely within the Lorentz model of hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^d$ to natively preserve the hierarchical tree topology of the human skeleton. Current state-of-the-art pose estimators aim to capture complex joint dynamics by relying on transformers and graph convolutional networks. Since these architectures operate exclusively in Euclidean space which fundamentally mismatches the inherent tree structure of the human body, these methods inevitably suffer from exponential volume distortion and struggle to maintain structural coherence. To this end, we depart from flat spaces and aim to improve geometric fidelity with Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA), natively embedding complex joint relationships without distortion, alongside a multi-scale windowed hyperbolic attention mechanism that efficiently models temporal dynamics in $O(TW)$ complexity. Furthermore, to overcome the well-known instability of training non-Euclidean manifolds, HYPERPOSE introduces a novel Riemannian loss suite and an uncertainty-weighted curriculum, enforcing physical geodesic constraints like bone length and velocity consistency. Extensive evaluations on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate that HYPERPOSE achieves state-of-the-art structural and temporal coherence, significantly reducing both volume distortion and velocity error, while establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks in overall positional accuracy.
2605.10100.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 HYPERPOSE，一個新穎的 3D 人體姿勢估計框架，該框架在超曲面空間的洛倫茲模型 $\mathbb{H}^d$ 內完全進行時空推理，以原生方式保留人體骨架的層次樹拓撲。當前最先進的姿勢估計器旨在通過依賴Transformer和圖卷積網絡來捕捉複雜的關節動態。由於這些架構僅在歐幾里得空間中運作，這與人體固有的樹狀結構根本不匹配，因此這些方法不可避免地遭受指數體積失真，並難以維持結構一致性。為此，我們脫離平坦空間，旨在通過超曲線運動相位空間注意力（HKPSA）提高幾何保真度，原生嵌入複雜的關節關係而不產生失真，同時配合一種多尺度窗口超曲線注意力機制，以 $O(TW)$ 的複雜度有效建模時間動態。此外，為了克服訓練非歐幾里得流形的著名不穩定性，HYPERPOSE 引入了一套新穎的黎曼損失套件和不確定性加權課程，強化物理測地約束，如骨長和速度一致性。在 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 數據集上的廣泛評估表明，HYPERPOSE 實現了最先進的結構和時間一致性，顯著減少了體積失真和速度誤差，同時在整體位置準確性方面建立了新的最先進基準。
2605.10100.author: Vinduja T. et.al.
2605.10100.authors: Vinduja T., Ashish M., Ajay Waghumbare, Upasna Singh
